title: userDetailsReducer — initial data changed to null + ONAUTHENTICATE clears profileToken
commit_message: fix: initialise data as null and clear profileToken on ONAUTHENTICATE

CRITICAL.reason: describe() block label exactly matches changed symbol — userDetailsReducer directly modified
tests: userDetailsReducer > initialises with data as an empty array
userDetailsReducer > SUCCESS action populates data and token from the payload
userDetailsReducer > UPDATEREFRESHEDTOKEN updates token and loginTime independently
userDetailsReducer > ONAUTHENTICATE resets profileAuthSuccess to false
userDetailsReducer > SHOWLOGGEDOUTSHEET stores the payload in showLoggedOutSheet
userDetailsReducer > returns unchanged state for an unknown action type

HIGH.reason: actiotypes.js changed symbols (ONAUTHENTICATE) shared with profileReducer in same suite
tests: profileReducer > initialises with an empty profileData array
profileReducer > PROFILESDETAILS action replaces profileData with the new list
profileReducer > SAVESELECTEDPROFILEDETAILS stores the chosen profile
profileReducer > returns current state unchanged for an unrecognised action

LOW.reason: No loosely connected tests referencing userDetailsReducer

SKIP.reason: Sources have zero overlap with userDetailsReducer.js

coverage_gaps.note: initialises with data as an empty array — after this change, data is null. The test 'initialises with data as an empty array' will FAIL and must be updated to expect(state.data).toBeNull()

coverage_gaps.recommended_test: ONAUTHENTICATE also clears profileToken to undefined
